title: Bombay High Court upholds acquittal of all 22 accused in Sohrabuddin fake encounter case
description: The Bombay High Court today dismissed the appeals challenging the acquittal of all 22 accused, including 21 police personnel, in the fake encounter killings of Sohrabuddin Shaikh, his wife Kauser Bi and associate Tulsiram Prajapati.A division bench comprising Chief Justice Shree Chandrashekhar and Justice Gautam Ankhad upheld the acquittal and dismissed the appeals filed by Shaikh's brothers Rubabuddin and Nayabuddin.The detailed judgment is awaited.Chief Justice Shree Chandrashekar and Gautam A
